d:
Passive. Lily May enters a Defensive State at the start of a battle. When a non-summoned enemy casts their Ultimate, Lily May becomes [[unaffected]]. She then leaps above the enemy and shoots a Quellbolt, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage and interrupting the enemy's Ultimate, while causing the enemy to lose [[700]] Energy. Afterward, she exits the Defensive and [[unaffected]] States. This skill cannot interrupt boss enemies but increases Lily May's damage dealt to them by [[400%]].
Active. Lily May can trigger her Defensive State against all non-summoned enemies or a specific non-summoned enemy. If she defends against all non-summoned enemies, she will target the first to use their Ultimate. If she defends against a specific non-summoned enemy, she will target only them when they use their Ultimate. If that enemy becomes untargetable for over 3s or is defeated, she switches to defending against all enemies and targets the first to use their Ultimate.
When Auto Battle is enabled, Lily May automatically chooses to defend against all enemies.
Increases damage dealt by Quellbolt to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Quellbolt to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Quellbolt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt by Quellbolt to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Lily May flashes to the target and attacks 6 times, dealing [[65%]]<ATK> damage per hit. She remains [[invincible]] during these attacks and returns to her original tile afterward. If her Defensive State is triggered during the attacks, she will finish the remaining attacks after exiting the Defensive State.
Increases damage to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[80%]]<ATK>.

Lily May grows stronger during battle. Each normal attack or skill grants her EXP points, with extra points awarded for [[assists or defeats]]. Once her EXP bar is full, she grows stronger, permanently increasing her ATK by [[10%]] and enhancing her next [[4]] normal attacks or attacks from Rainstorm Ballet. The enhanced attacks deal additional true damage equal to [[3%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[75%]] of Lily May's ATK. This growth effect can stack up to [[4]] times.
Enhanced attacks deal additional true damage equal to [[4%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[100%]] of Lily May's ATK.
Enhanced attacks deal additional true damage equal to [[5%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[125%]] of Lily May's ATK.
Enhanced attacks deal additional true damage equal to [[6%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[150%]] of Lily May's ATK.
Lily May gains [[10]] Penetration during battle and an additional [[5]] Penetration when using Rainstorm Ballet.
Lily May gains [[13]] Penetration during battle and an additional [[6]] Penetration when using Rainstorm Ballet.
Lily May gains [[16]] Penetration during battle and an additional [[8]] Penetration when using Rainstorm Ballet.
Lily May grows once upon receiving a non-permanent stats boost from an ally. Each ally can trigger this effect once per battle.
Increases ATK boost granted by each of her growth to [[12%]].
Allows her to deal [[2]] additional attacks the next time she casts Rainstorm Ballet with each growth.
Increases ATK boost granted by each of her growth to [[14%]].
When Lily May first uses Tempest Shot to interrupt an enemy's Ultimate, the enemy loses [[1000]] Energy.
